expectations.text: The response mentions /branch as the in-session way to fork
expectations.evidence: '/branch approach-a' shown as primary method. Also notes '/fork works as an alias for /branch'.

expectations.text: The response mentions claude --resume <session-id> --fork-session as the CLI way
The response explains that forking creates a copy of the conversation that diverges from that point
expectations.evidence: 'creates a new session that copies your entire conversation history up to that point. The original session stays untouched.'
